message:
fix(packs/featureflags): close safe-pattern bypass on list/get/create/etc in flag names

All four featureflags packs (unleash, split, launchdarkly, flipt) used
trailing `\b` on each read-only subcommand. Flag, project, environment,
or segment names containing the safe subcommand keyword as a substring
would short-circuit destructive ops:

  unleash features delete get-experiment         -> matched features-get
  split splits kill list-archive                 -> matched splits-list
  ldcli flags delete --flag create-legacy-flag   -> matched flags-create
  flipt flag delete evaluate-v1                  -> matched flipt-evaluate

Changed trailing `\b` to `(?=\s|$)` on every single-token safe subcommand
across the four packs (~50 patterns total).

files.patch:
@@ -26,26 +26,26 @@ pub fn create_pack() -> Pack {
 fn create_safe_patterns() -> Vec<SafePattern> {
     vec![
         // flipt CLI - list/get operations
-        safe_pattern!("flipt-flag-list", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+flag\s+list\b"),
-        safe_pattern!("flipt-flag-get", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+flag\s+get\b"),

-        safe_pattern!("flipt-rule-create", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+rule\s+create\b"),
-        safe_pattern!("flipt-evaluate", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+evaluate\b"),
+        safe_pattern!("flipt-flag-list", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+flag\s+list(?=\s|$)"),

+        safe_pattern!("flipt-flag-create", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+flag\s+create(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("flipt-flag-update", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+flag\s+update(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("flipt-segment-list", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+segment\s+list(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("flipt-segment-get", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+segment\s+get(?=\s|$)"),

+        safe_pattern!("flipt-namespace-list", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+namespace\s+list(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("flipt-namespace-get", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+namespace\s+get(?=\s|$)"),

+        safe_pattern!("flipt-rule-create", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+rule\s+create(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("flipt-evaluate", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+evaluate(?=\s|$)"),
         // Help and version commands
-        safe_pattern!("flipt-help", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+(?:--help|-h|help)\b"),
-        safe_pattern!("flipt-version", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+(?:--version|version)\b"),
+        safe_pattern!("flipt-help", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+(?:--help|-h|help)(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("flipt-version", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+(?:--version|version)(?=\s|$)"),
         // Server commands (safe)
-        safe_pattern!("flipt-server", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+(?:server|serve)\b"),
-        safe_pattern!("flipt-config", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+config\b"),
+        safe_pattern!("flipt-server", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+(?:server|serve)(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("flipt-config", r"flipt(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+config(?=\s|$)"),
     ]
 }
